title: today .. is the day.
content:
me go see asanee-wasan this afternoon. me have no camera. it'll be an eyes-brain only concert. :P

regarding the entry from last couple of days, i was TOO generalized (on the nationalities) - i'm aware of that. it's my intention. :) however, it's very nice to see different opinions from readers every once in a while.  %(me)and, thank you!%  hehehehe ...
